# uptimekuma_monitor_tailscale_ping (Data Source)

Get Tailscale Ping monitor information by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uptimekuma_monitor_tailscale_ping" "example" {
  name = "Tailscale Node Monitoring"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier.
- `name` (String) Monitor name.

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) Tailscale hostname or IP address to ping.
